case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. LLATA EMILIO A. RESURRECION

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $55.00) SERVED JAN-12-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT RESURRECION, LLATA EMILIO A.
